screens.name: Product Listing Page
screens.description: Displays a searchable and filterable list of all available products.

screens.name: Product Detail Page
screens.description: Displays comprehensive information about a single product, including pricing and stock status.

screens.name: Shopping Cart
screens.description: Allows the user to review, modify quantities, and calculate the total cost of items in the cart.

screens.name: Checkout
screens.description: Collects shipping and payment information to finalize the order.
